testcase.name: UI: DemoQA Book Store Flow › Full book store flow: login → search → log book → logout @UI

failure.message: ui.spec.js:11:3 Full book store flow: login → search → log book → logout @UI

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui\ui.spec.js:11:3 › UI: DemoQA Book Store Flow › Full book store flow: login → search → log book → logout @UI › Login as "usharma759@gmail.com"
Error: page.waitForURL: Target page, context or browser has been closed =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/profile" until "load" navigated to "https://app.smartlead.ai/login" ============================================================
at ..\pages\LoginPage.js:30
28 | await this.click(this.loginButton); 29 | // waitForURL alone is flaky on WebKit — userNameLabel visibility confirms login is fully settled > 30 | await this.page.waitForURL('**/profile', { timeout: 60000 }); | ^ 31 | await expect(this.userNameLabel).toBeVisible({ timeout: 60000 }); 32 | } 33 | at LoginPage.login (D:\Demo Project\Playwright_UI_API_Automation-master\Playwright_UI_API_Automation-master\pages\LoginPage.js:30:21) at D:\Demo Project\Playwright_UI_API_Automation-master\Playwright_UI_API_Automation-master\tests\ui\ui.spec.js:18:7 at D:\Demo Project\Playwright_UI_API_Automation-master\Playwright_UI_API_Automation-master\tests\ui\ui.spec.js:17:5
